Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The main character's {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]and determination lit a fire in my soul...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cinematic shots filled with beauty and[n]{f 4 30 1 1 1 0} made me appreciate the arts...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the characters use body language to[n]communicate honed my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching how the kids faced their[n]fears gave me some {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My heart was captivated by the[n]{f 4 30 1 1 1 0} in this epic love story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seeing someone earnestly pursue the[n]truth helped refine my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
